name: Nectarine Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped nectarines, water, and honey in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium-high heat until the nectarines are soft.
3. Remove from heat and puree the mixture in a blender or food processor.
4. Stir in lemon juice, vanilla extract, and apple juice.
5. Chill until cool.
6. Whisk the yogurt into the nectarine mixture.
7. Pour into an 8 x 8-inch pan and freeze until crystals form around the edges, about 45 minutes.
8. Stir the crystals into the middle of the pan and return to the freezer.
9. When lightly frozen through, whip the mixture until light in color.
10. Spoon into a storage container and freeze until firm.
11. Let soften at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
